description:
You are a data scientist who just received a small CSV file that contains repeated rows.  
Your goal is to deduplicate the table with one concise **single-line** terminal command and save the cleaned version next to the original file.

Filesystem layout that already exists when you start:
1. Directory:  
   /home/user/datasets/
2. File (original, WITH duplicates):  
   /home/user/datasets/sugar_levels.csv  
   Exact initial contents (including the header row and the terminating newline character on the last line):

patient_id,glucose_mg_dl,timestamp
P001,110,2023-07-01 09:00
P002,145,2023-07-01 09:05
P001,110,2023-07-01 09:00
P003,90,2023-07-01 09:10
P002,145,2023-07-01 09:05
P004,130,2023-07-01 09:15

Task requirements
A. Create a new file called  
   /home/user/datasets/sugar_levels_dedup.csv  

B. The new file MUST contain the same header followed by the unique data lines, preserving their first-appearance order. Its exact expected text (again, with a final newline on the last line) is:

patient_id,glucose_mg_dl,timestamp
P001,110,2023-07-01 09:00
P002,145,2023-07-01 09:05
P003,90,2023-07-01 09:10
P004,130,2023-07-01 09:15

C. Use **one single shell command** (pipelines are allowed but it must be written on a single line) to read the original file and write the cleaned output file.

D. Do not modify the original /home/user/datasets/sugar_levels.csv.

E. When you finish, the automated test will:
   1. Check that /home/user/datasets/sugar_levels_dedup.csv exists.
   2. Confirm that its bytes match the exact block of text shown in requirement B (including newline placements).
   3. Verify that the original file is unaltered.

No additional files or directories should be changed or created.
truth:
Pre-existing directory: /home/user/datasets (permission 755, owned by user).

Pre-existing file: /home/user/datasets/sugar_levels.csv (permission 644, owned by user).  
Binary-exact content:

patient_id,glucose_mg_dl,timestamp
P001,110,2023-07-01 09:00
P002,145,2023-07-01 09:05
P001,110,2023-07-01 09:00
P003,90,2023-07-01 09:10
P002,145,2023-07-01 09:05
P004,130,2023-07-01 09:15

Expected file to be created by agent: /home/user/datasets/sugar_levels_dedup.csv (permission 644, owned by user).  
Exactly-matching content:

patient_id,glucose_mg_dl,timestamp
P001,110,2023-07-01 09:00
P002,145,2023-07-01 09:05
P003,90,2023-07-01 09:10
P004,130,2023-07-01 09:15

No other filesystem changes are expected.  
Automated tester will diff the files byte-for-byte.
